claim_statement: C-086a directional near-perigee signature is primary; C-086b v1 is frozen fail history; C-086b2 and C-086b3 are locked numeric branches under disjoint holdouts.
formula_anchor: C-086a sign(a_res_parallel)=sign(v.gradSigma); C-086b2 band audit + C-086b3 covariate scaling audit under disjoint holdouts
dataset: Flyby/deep-space telemetry (Galileo, NEAR, Rosetta, Cassini, Juno, Pioneer)
method: Fit lag term a_res=-tau(v.nabla)nablaSigma on trajectory residuals vs GR-only baseline with fixed controls and report-only amplitude audit.
pass_condition: Directional/sign and robustness gates pass on same-sample weighted likelihood.
fail_condition: Directional gates fail after controls, or consistency collapses under robustness checks.

.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe scripts\run_qng_t_028_trajectory_real.py --test-id QNG-T-041 --dataset-id DS-005 --flyby-csv data/trajectory/flyby_ds005_real.csv --use-pioneer-anchor --pioneer-csv data/trajectory/pioneer_ds005_anchor.csv --flyby-pass-ids CASSINI_1,MESSENGER_1,EPOXI_5 --pioneer-record-ids P11_EQ24,P10P11_FINAL --amp-gate-mode strict --amp-band-min 1e-6 --amp-band-max 6e-6 --out-dir "05_validation/evidence/artifacts/qng-t-041-c086b2-holdout-h3" --seed 20260243

decision.note: Directional C-086a gates pass on real cross-domain DS-005 run; C-086b v1 is frozen fail history; C-086b2 holdout fails; C-086b3 holdout is now executed (not blocked) and currently fails under provisional Horizons-ingested holdout residual placeholders.

reproducibility.environment: Python stdlib-only real flyby + pioneer anchor summary pipeline
